title: mentha collivaga
intro: Mentha collivaga, also known as Peruvian mint, is a species of mint native to South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Mentha collivaga include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from headaches and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Mentha collivaga can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, allowing for a range of applications in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
